name: Weather-Aware Booking
description: Branches on weather-API forecast to offer reschedule vs. confirm.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental. The forecast looks rainy for your visit on {{bookingStartsAt}} — no pressure at all, but if you'd like an easier trip in, we're happy to move you to the same time next week. Reply YES to reschedule, or just ignore this and we'll see you as planned!

args.subject: You're all set for your visit to Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

You're confirmed for your appointment on {{bookingStartsAt}}. The weather looks clear, so we'll see you then — no need to reply.

If anything comes up beforehand, just reach out and we'll sort it out together. We're looking forward to meeting you and making this the most relaxed dental visit you've ever had.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
